title: sabina procera
intro: Sabina procera, also known as the Juniperus sabina or Savin juniper, is a small evergreen shrub native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and as a diuretic to relieve urinary problems. The health benefits of Sabina procera include reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Sabina procera is often prepared as a tincture, tea, or essential oil for medicinal use, although its safety and efficacy may vary depending on individual tolerance and specific health conditions.
